subcodes.first_line: The heavens of bounty have been set in motion by the breezes of grace, and the ocean of generosity surgeth with the winds of thy Lord's tender mercy, the All-Compelling [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد تحرکت افلاک الجود من نفحات الفضل و تموج بحر الکرم من اریاح عنایه ربک المهیمن
subcodes.subjects: @realms of being; three realms; five realms, @symbolism, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @love of God
